description_long: This is a brown glass bottle with a classic soda shape, featuring a long neck and a rounded shoulder that tapers into a cylindrical body. The bottle has a red cap on top, which appears to be a metal crown cap, and a prominent red label wrapped around the body with the word 'cola' written in white, cursive script. The label is centered on the front and does not extend all the way around the bottle, leaving the back plain. The surface of the bottle is smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. There are no visible signs of damage, wear, or deformation on the bottle. The bottle is opaque, making it impossible to see any contents inside.
description: A brown glass soda bottle with a red crown cap and a red 'cola' label in white script on the front. The bottle is smooth, glossy, and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red 'cola' label in white script and the red crown cap.
description_view_1: Angled side view with the edge of the label visible, showing mostly the plain brown glass surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain brown glass with no label or markings visible.
description_view_3: Angled side view with the opposite edge of the label visible, mostly showing the brown glass surface.
attribute_label_or_branding: A red label with the word 'cola' in white cursive script, centered on the front of the bottle.
